title: [Immersive Railroading] Belgian voxel trains pack
body:
# ⚫️🟡🔴 🚂 Belgian voxel trains pack 🚂 ⚫️🟡🔴 ![Pack Belgian Voxel Trains by SimNoLuc](https://sim-studio.net/SimNoTrains/2024-08-14_20.00.15%202.png)
![Belgian Voxel Trains Pack by SimNoLuc](https://sim-studio.net/SimNoTrains/2022-08-21_20.39.06%202.png)
**
🚧 WARNING: This pack is under development! 🚧
** Pack "Belgian Voxel Trains Pack" made by SimNoLuc Creation of Belgian locomotives and coaches of the SNCB / NMBS networks. The models are chosen according to my crush and my desire. If you want to see other models or contribute to the project, contact me! You can also support me by making a donation via Paypal to the following address: contact@sim-studio.be 🔘⚠️ You will absolutely need the mods "[Immersive Railroading](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/immersive-railroading)", "[universal-mod-core](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/universal-mod-core)" and "[track-api](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/track-api)". You can find more info on their respective pages. Then you must place the .ZIP file (without unzipping) in your .minecraft folder -> resourcepacks. After that activate it from the game menu as if to add a classic texture pack. If you have any problem, don't be afraid to contact me 😉 - 🔘 You can see my mod "[Belgian Signal & Catenary - Voxel Pack](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/belgian-signal-catenary-voxel-pack)" which adds signals and catenaries typical of Belgium! - 🔘 Here is my project to make some trains from Belgium in voxel. I am very inspired by the pack "[Voxel Trains IR](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/voxel-trains-ir)" who does a really great job! I also recommend that you use it for more immersion. - 🔘 The pack is available for version 1.12.2 to 1.16.4 of Minecraft. I do my best to keep it up to date. I also try to follow the updates of the main IR mod to upgrade my pack. - 🔘 I am also planning the creation of a voxel pack for construction work and dealing with railway in general. I would like to complete this pack a little bit before starting the new one. Do not hesitate to give your opinion or offer your help! 😉 - 🔘 NEW: I made an addon for the Create mod to run my Belgian trains with the technology of this mod. Go try, it’s super fun! [Available here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-belgian-voxel-trains). ![Gif of my trains](https://sim-studio.net/SimNoTrains/Video-BG-Longueur-Train.gif) _Current version: V1.4.2
Last update: 01/02/2024 (DD-MM-YYYY)_
![Trains of the pack](https://sim-studio.net/SimNoTrains/2022-08-17_22.50.16%202.png) ☑️ For the moment, here is the list of equipment already available :
Spoiler 🟢 - AM96_B10X (Automotrice version) 🟢 - AM96_A9Dx (1st class automotrice) 🟢 - AM96_B10 (Passenger) 🟢 - HLE27 (Electric locomotive) 🟢 - AM66_A (Automotrice) 🟢 - AM66_B (Automotrice) 🟢 - I11_BDx (Automotrice) 🟢 - I11_A (Vip Passenger) 🟢 - I11_B (Passenger)
![Models available](https://sim-studio.net/SimNoTrains/2022-08-21_20.35.21%202.png) 🔜 Models I want to create : Railcars and wagons :
Spoiler 🟠 - AM CityRail 🔴 - AM RER (AM08) 🟢 - AM66_A 🟢 - AM66_B 🔴 - AM75 🔴 - AM80 🔴 - AM86 🟢 - AM96_B10x 🟢 - AM96_B10 🟢 - AM96_A9Dx 🔴 - AR41 🟢 - I11_BDx (Another front design for AM96_B10X) 🟢 - I11_A 🟢 - I11_B 🔴 - M4 🔴 - M6 🔴 - M7 🔴 - Tram "LeTec" 🔴 - Tram "DeLijn"
Locomotives :
Spoiler 🟡 - Série 13 (HLE) 🟡 - Série 18 (HLE) 🟢 - Série 27 (HLE) 🔴 - Série 28 (HLD) 🔴 - Série 57 (HLD) 🔴 - Série 62-63 (HLD) 🔴 - Série 77-78 (HLD)
And a lot of cars that match the locomotives... _Legend:
🟢 : finished
🟠 : being finished
🟡 : started
🔴 : not start_ **_© 2024 - All Rights Reserved. By SimNoLuc - Sim-STUDIO ⚫️🟡🔴_**
